LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO INCORPORATED'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO APPLIES FOR A WRIT OF ATTACHMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT AMIR ASLI, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA BACHEESO AND DBA BACHEESO GARDEN BISTRO. (APPLICATION, 2.) PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF ITS CLAIM AGAINST MR. ASLI. (CCP 484.090.) THE OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT IDENTIFIES THE ACCOUNT HOLDER AS "BACHEESO", AND NOT MR. ASLI. (ABLEMAN DECL., EXHIBIT A.) PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PRESENTED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO DEMONSTRATE THAT MR. ASLI DOES BUSINESS AS BACHEESO. IN THE COMPLAINT, PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THAT MR. ASLI SIGNED A PERSONAL GUARANTY. (COMPLAINT, 14, EXHIBIT B.) HOWEVER, THE COMPLAINT IS NOT VERIFIED AS AVERRED IN THE APPLICATION. (COMPARE COMPLAINT; WITH APPLICATION, 7A, COOK DECL., P. 1:10-11.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment As Void, To Quash Writs Of Execution And Release Liens; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations Of Tiffany Le And Ilene M. Hochstein

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jun-11-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO INCORPORATED'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is denied. Plaintiff Sysco San Francisco applies for a writ of attachment against Defendant Amir Asli, individually and dba Bacheeso and dba Bacheeso Garden Bistro. (Application, 2.) Plaintiff has not established the probable validity of its claim against Mr. Asli. (CCP 484.090.) The open book account identifies the account holder as "Bacheeso", and not Mr. Asli. (Ableman Decl., Exhibit A.) Plaintiff has not presented sufficient evidence to demonstrate that Mr. Asli does business as Bacheeso. In the Complaint, Plaintiff alleges that Mr. Asli signed a personal guaranty. (Complaint, 14, Exhibit B.) However, the Complaint is not verified as averred in the Application. (Compare Complaint; with Application, 7a, Cook Decl., p. 1:10-11.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
